name: hex-economy-v2
description: Hex-economy v2 balance sandbox + headless test harness (labor/wealth/roads).

scripts.validate: node test/validate_core.js && node test/validate_layers.js && node test/validate_organic.js && node test/validate_transport.js && node test/validate_planet.js && node test/validate_trade.js
scripts.test: node test/validate_core.js && node test/validate_layers.js && node test/validate_organic.js && node test/validate_transport.js && node test/validate_planet.js && node test/validate_trade.js
scripts.loop: npm run sweep && npm run analyze && npm run steer
